tools.name: search_openfda_labels
tools.description: Search openFDA drug labeling data for product indications, warnings, and dosage sections.

product_name.description: Drug, biologic, or device product name.

limit.description: Maximum number of label records to return.

tools.name: get_openfda_adverse_events
tools.description: Retrieve adverse event summaries and signal trends from openFDA for a product or ingredient.

product_name.description: Drug, biologic, or device product name.

limit.description: Maximum number of event summaries to return.

tools.name: get_openfda_recalls
tools.description: Retrieve recall or enforcement data from openFDA based on product or classification.
